title: mpvQC document (version 1)
description: A structured quality check (QC) report: timestamped comments on a video file.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema, exactly its published URL. Lets editors and validators pick up the contract from the document itself.

version.description: Version of the document format. Any change to the format increments it.

created_at.description: When the document was written: a UTC timestamp, exactly 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ'.

generator.description: Free-form name and version of the program that wrote the document.

author.description: Name or nickname of the person who performed the quality check.

video.description: Absolute path to the checked video file, in the path syntax of the writing OS.

subtitles.description: Absolute paths to external subtitle files loaded during the quality check. Omitted when there are none.

comments.description: QC comments. Order is not guaranteed; entries may share a time, and duplicates are valid.

time.description: Video position as 'HH:MM:SS.mmm', zero-padded, millisecond precision.

type.description: Comment category, a free-form string. Locale-dependent: not a stable identifier.

text.description: The comment itself, a single line without line breaks. May be empty.
